sourcePrompt: An AN/PRC-25 field-radio stack for a command post, about half a meter tall on its crate. A boxy olive-drab radio set with a dialed control face, a coiled handset cable hanging to a handset hooked on the side, a long whip antenna rising well overhead, and a spare battery box stacked beneath. Olive-drab metal, black dials and a thin whip, field communications.
